zh.lifeSummary: Senana ferch Caradog是Man和?的女兒，於1198年出生在威爾士安格萊利安法斯。她於1222年與Gruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawr結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1263年在她的家鄉享年65歲，埋葬在威爾士安格萊利安法斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Senana ferch Caradog是Man和?的女儿，于1198年出生在威尔士安格萊利安法斯。她于1222年与Gruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawr结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1263年在她的家乡享年65岁，埋葬在威尔士安格萊利安法斯。

nameMeanings.name: Senana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Pasquale, Salvatore.
Italian: habitational name from Senna Comasco or Senna Lodigiana in Lombardy, possibly taking their names from an Etruscan personal name, Semna.
Italian: possibly also from the feminine form of the male personal name Senno, a short form of a personal name formed with this suffix, such as Bonsenno.

variants.name: Senay
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adelard, Armand, Marcel, Origene.
Altered form of French Senet (see Seney ). The surname Senay, which is a variant of Seney and hence probably a cognate of Senet, is also found in France (mainly Seine-Maritime).

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting the plant (Old English fearn). Modern use of this word as a given name dates from the 19th century, when it is also recorded occasionally as a boy's name in the United States. In some instances the given name may be a transferred use of the surname derived in the medieval period from the vocabulary word.

nameMeanings.name: Caradog
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Respelling of Caradog, an ancient Celtic name apparently derived from the root cār ‘love’. This name was borne by a British chieftain of the 1st century ad in the Latinized form Caractacus, son of Cunobelinos.

en.lifeSummary: Senana ferch Caradog was born in 1198, in Llanfaes, Anglesey, Wales as the daughter of Man and ?. She married Gruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawr in 1222. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1263, in her hometown, at the age of 65, and was buried in Llanfaes, Anglesey, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Senana ferch Caradog est née en 1198, à Llanfaes, Anglesey, Galles, fille de Man et ?. Elle a épousé Gruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawr en 1222. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1263, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Llanfaes, Anglesey, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Senana ferch Caradog wurde 1198 in Llanfaes, Anglesey, Wales, als Tochter von Man und ? geboren. Sie hat 1222 Gruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1263 im Alter von 65 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Llanfaes, Anglesey, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Senana ferch Caradog è nata il nel 1198 nel Llanfaes, Anglesey, Galles come figlia di Man e ?. Lei sposato Gruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawr nel 1222. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1263, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a Llanfaes, Anglesey, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Senana ferch Caradogは1198年にウェールズアングレセイランファスでManと?の娘として生まれた。1222年にGruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawrと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1263年に故郷で65歳で死去し，ウェールズアングレセイランファスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Senana ferch Caradog(은)는 1198년 웨일스 앤글레시 랜파이스에서 Man(와)과 ?의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1222년 Gruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1263년 그녀의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 앤글레시 랜파이스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Senana ferch Caradog nasceu em 1198, em Llanfaes, Anglesey, Gales filha de Man e ?. Ela casou-se com Gruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawr em 1222. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1263, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Llanfaes, Anglesey, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Senana ferch Caradog родилась в 1198 г. в местности лланфаесь, англеси, Уэльс. Её родителей звали Man и ?. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawr в 1222 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1263 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности лланфаесь, англеси, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Senana ferch Caradog nació en 1198, en Llanfaes, Isla Oscura, Gales como hija de Man y ?. Se casó con Gruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawr en 1222. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1263, en su pueblo, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Llanfaes, Isla Oscura, Gales.
